SessionStart.description: Load active company context from previous session
SessionStart.action: Check for last active company in companies/*/manifest.md (most recent last_modified). If found, read manifest.md, structure.md, and taskwall.md to restore context.

PreCompact.description: Summarize company state before context compaction
PreCompact.action: Read active company's shared-context.md. Keep: active tasks, blockers, recent decisions. Drop: completed task details, old chatter. Write summarized version back.

SessionEnd.description: Persist company state at session end
SessionEnd.action: Update last_modified in manifest.md. Write current working state to shared-context.md. Ensure all agent state files are up to date.

PostAgentRun.description: Audit log after every agent execution
PostAgentRun.action: Append agent action result to companies/<name>/logs/audit.jsonl with timestamp, agent name, action, and result.
